question: Define an abstract base class `Printable` with a pure virtual method `print()`. Derive two concrete classes, `Document` and `Image`, from `Printable`. Implement the `print()` method in each derived class to display appropriate information (e.g., 'Printing Document: [title]', 'Printing Image: [filename]').

test_cases.expected:
Printing Document: Meeting Minutes
Printing Image: sunset.jpg
Printing Document: Project Proposal
Printing Image: mountains.png

errors: The 'Document' class does not implement the pure virtual method 'print()' inherited from 'Printable'. This makes 'Document' an abstract class. Attempting to instantiate an abstract class (e.g., 'Document doc("Meeting Minutes");') is a semantic error, as abstract classes cannot be directly instantiated.
